title: Another U.S. Service Member Is Killed as Iran War Expands
summary_full: The Pentagon said a service member was killed in northern Iraq while troops disposed of an Iranian drone. It also said “unidentified remains” were found in Jordan, where an earlier attack had left two soldiers dead and another missing.
